scripts.check: pnpm run test && pnpm run lint && node --check web-extension/background.js && node --check web-extension/hints.js && node --check web-extension/help.js && node --check web-extension/scroll-surface.js && node --check web-extension/settings.js && node --check web-extension/options.js && node --check web-extension/content.js
scripts.check:ci: pnpm run test && pnpm run lint:ci && node --check web-extension/background.js && node --check web-extension/hints.js && node --check web-extension/help.js && node --check web-extension/scroll-surface.js && node --check web-extension/settings.js && node --check web-extension/options.js && node --check web-extension/content.js
scripts.build:xcode: pnpm run build:web && DEVELOPER_DIR=/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer xcodebuild -project "xcode/Safari Keyboard Navigation Extension/Safari Keyboard Navigation Extension.xcodeproj" -scheme "Safari Keyboard Navigation Extension" -configuration Debug -derivedDataPath DerivedData CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build
scripts.build:xcode:release: pnpm run build:web && DEVELOPER_DIR=/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer xcodebuild -project "xcode/Safari Keyboard Navigation Extension/Safari Keyboard Navigation Extension.xcodeproj" -scheme "Safari Keyboard Navigation Extension" -configuration Release -derivedDataPath DerivedData CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build
scripts.archive:xcode: pnpm run build:web && DEVELOPER_DIR=/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer xcodebuild -project "xcode/Safari Keyboard Navigation Extension/Safari Keyboard Navigation Extension.xcodeproj" -scheme "Safari Keyboard Navigation Extension" -configuration Release -archivePath "xcode/Safari Keyboard Navigation Extension.xcarchive" archive
